parameters.jsonExample: {"tenant": {"business_id": "uuid-here", "order_id": "CUST_260606_001", "business_name": "مطعم السدة", "instance_name": "arq-cust-260606-001", "admin_whatsapp": "201029168056"}, "customer": {"id": "CUST_001", "name": "محمد", "phone": "201234567890"}, "reason": "complaint", "customer_message": "الأكل كان بارد", "context_summary": "العميل طلب 3 مرات قبل كده، الـ Sentiment Score = -2", "conversation_id": "CONV_20260613_12345"}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $json.admin_whatsapp, options: { delay: 1200 }, textMessage: { text: $json.admin_alert } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.business_id, conversation_id: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.conversation_id || null, escalation_id: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.escalation_id, customer_id: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.customer?.id || $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.customer?.phone, customer_name: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.customer?.name || '', customer_phone: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.customer?.phone || '', reason: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.reason, reason_text: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.reason_text, customer_message: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.customer_message, context_summary: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.context_summary, status: 'open', created_at: $('ESCALATION_PREPARE').item.json.timestamp }) }}

meta.description: Inserts into Supabase escalations table, sends WhatsApp alert to admin via Evolution API, marks conversation as escalated. Replaces Google Sheets LOG_ESCALATION node.
